name: July 2025 Dinner
description: A packed evening at Ramen Space on vibe coding tools, evolving tech roles and AI eating software.

topics.text: Vibe Coding — Lovable demo; "last mile problem"; PRDs are critical
AI Tools — Claude Code vs Cursor; multi-agent workflows; Roo Code, tldraw, Vercel v0
AI is Eating Software — throwaway software; distribution still key; junior engineers must go AI native
Legacy Languages and AI — q language (Gabi), MUMPS (Simon); COBOL/Fortran migration via bloop.ai
Evolving Tech Roles — smaller teams; dev/PM/designer coalescence; "vibe designing" with MCP servers
AI in the Enterprise — internal use cases beat customer-facing chatbots; expert systems still valuable
Startup/Founder Insights — distribution > product (Justin Kan); founder-led sales; domain expertise
Recommended Reading — "AI 2027", "Situational Awareness: The Decade Ahead"
